summary: Comprehensive testing of delete buttons and AI features. All 6 features tested and working correctly. Delete buttons use onSelect handler in DropdownMenuItem components. AI Assistant dialogs generate content via OpenAI/Emergent LLM integration.

success_rate.backend: N/A (no backend tests run this iteration)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All delete buttons and AI features are working correctly. The delete buttons use onSelect instead of onClick for DropdownMenuItem components. AI features use Emergent LLM key for OpenAI integration.

features_tested.delete_client_button: PASS - Dropdown menu opens, Delete option visible with red color, confirmation dialog appears with Cancel/Delete buttons
features_tested.delete_template_button: PASS - Delete button (trash icon) visible on template cards, uses window.confirm() for confirmation
features_tested.delete_reminder_button: PASS - Dropdown menu opens with Edit and Delete options, Delete in red color, uses window.confirm() for confirmation
features_tested.ai_revival_assistant: PASS - AI Assistant button visible, dialog opens with Days Inactive/Last Stage/Approach/Industry options, Generate Revival Message button works, message generated successfully
features_tested.ai_drip_campaigns_assistant: PASS - AI Assistant button visible, dialog opens with Campaign Goal/Number of Messages/Industry options, Generate Sequence button works, multi-step sequence generated successfully
features_tested.ai_templates_assistant: PASS - AI Assistant button visible, dialog opens with Template Type/Tone options, Generate Template button works, template with variables generated successfully

technical_notes.delete_button_fix: DropdownMenuItem components now use onSelect instead of onClick for proper event handling
technical_notes.ai_integration: AI features use Emergent LLM key (sk-emergent-*) for OpenAI API calls
technical_notes.icon_class: Reminders page uses lucide-ellipsis class for the three-dot menu icon
